response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development in industrial automation, secure coding per IEC 62443, or cloud-based industrial platform design — core requirements for this role. Their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web technologies, with only a brief, outdated C++ exposure from 2007–2008, insufficient for a senior C++ architect role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse domains and languages
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Proven ability to deliver scalable systems and lead technical initiatives
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ experience relevant to high-performance industrial systems
Lacks demonstrated knowledge of IEC 62443, MQTT, or industrial protocols like OPC UA
Cloud exposure is limited to AWS CDK for web apps, not industrial on-prem/cloud hybrid platforms
